message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

abstract class DwarenMineWorker << (A,#BFE3E3) >> {
  goToSleep()
  wakeUp()
  goHome()
  goToMine()
  String name()
  void work()
}

class DwarenGoldmineFacade << (C,#BFE3C6) >> {
  Collection<DwarenMineWorker> worker
  makeAction(worker:Collection<DwarenMineWorker>,actions)
  startNewDay()
  digOutMine()
  endDay()
}

class DwarenCartOperator << (C,#BFE3C6) >>
class DwarenGoldDigger << (C,#BFE3C6) >>
class DwarenTunneDigger << (C,#BFE3C6) >>

DwarenCartOperator --|> DwarenMineWorker
DwarenGoldDigger --|> DwarenMineWorker
DwarenTunneDigger --|> DwarenMineWorker
@enduml
